certificate_kind.author: Reviewing Attorney
certificate_kind.basis: recorded notice of lis pendens under 14 M.R.S. § 4455 in an action involving the title to real estate

property_description: The real estate located at 5 Jamie C. Coe, York, County of York, State of Maine, described in a deed to Jane Q. Moe, Trustee, recorded in the York County Registry of Deeds in Book 16100, Page 250, the title to which is in litigation in this action.
